steps.title: Identify the compounds
steps.content: Thymol and methane identifies which gaseous compounds the sentence is discussing. Because that information is essential to the noun compounds, it should not be separated with commas.

steps.title: Remove extra commas
steps.content: Choice A and Choice B put an unnecessary comma after compounds. Choice D adds an unnecessary comma after methane. The no-comma version keeps the essential identifier attached to the noun it specifies. The answer is C.
